title: Avoid comparing with None as a constant
description: Comparing a variable with None as a constant can lead to confusing code when the variable is intended to contain other values. It may also cause unexpected behaviors when the variable is accidentally assigned a value other than None.
message: Avoid comparing with None as a constant.
recommendation: Compare with a variable that can hold any value, not a constant.

compliant.description: Using a variable to compare with x

why_is_this_an_issue: Comparing with None as a constant can lead to confusing code and unexpected behaviors.
how_to_fix: Compare with a variable that can hold any value, not a constant.
